script: test -n "${MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR:-}"; test -d "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR"; test -w "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR"; mkdir -p "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke"; printf '%s\n' volume-ready > "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke/last-check.txt"; cat "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke/last-check.txt"
command:
exec 2>&1
test -n "${MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR:-}"; test -d "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR"; test -w "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR"; mkdir -p "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke"; printf '%s\n' volume-ready > "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke/last-check.txt"; cat "$MAESTRO_AGENT_STATE_DIR/smoke/last-check.txt"
